title: Os' Shimmering Ores
description:
Emissive and non-emissive options available. Emissive version requires Optifine or McMeta Emissive Textures.

Make your ores shine and glimmer with animations. Using the emissive version, they'll shine in the dark like a beacon begging you to mine them!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack aesthetically animates the ores in your world to shine and glimmer throughout the caves and caverns. Choose between a non-emissive and emissive version. With the emissive version, ores are practically begging to be mined, catching your eye from the other side of the cave! If you experience z-fighting glitches, turn off your 'smooth lighting' setting. | Emissive Version*
![Picture of the emissive texture](https://i.imgur.com/0emdkRK.gif) | Non-emissive version
![Picture of the non-emissive texture](https://i.imgur.com/ntOWMru.gif) | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:| ## *Please note that the emissive version REQUIRES
Optifine or More McMeta Emissive Textures.
| [More McMeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive/versions) | [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads) | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:| | [![Download More McMeta Emissive Textures here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c561e407cc048ac0f9b7e361846b25c835614a2b.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive/versions) | [![Download Optifine here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c638eaa2f9d764974f6169da1e220c9b3bae9a94.png)](https://www.optifine.net/downloads) | If you're using Optifine, make sure you have these settings on: - Emissive Textures: ON # ![Get 25% off your first month with Bisect hosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/c3960ebf-eb9a-4a08-b6b5-d9ea5104a60a.png)https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page. Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/)[![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/zqkNdbZ.png)](https://emilybau.com) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
